markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's proposed content strategy and incorporate Fieldwire's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** The strategy will shift from broad topics to deep, niche content, focusing on specific trades (e.g., electrical) and high-growth segments (e.g., data centers) to capture high-intent users.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**New Clusters:** Two high-priority clusters were added: "Integrations" to support a connected ecosystem narrative and "AI/Field Intelligence" to build thought leadership for the May launch.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2590.0)
  - [**Content Depth:** The team agreed to fix "light" landing pages and optimize existing blogs to improve rankings and better compete with rivals like Procore.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Refined Plan:** GrowthX will update the strategy with new competitor research (Bluebeam, Kraaft, Trunk Tools) and the new clusters by next Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3627.0)

## Topics

### Competitor Landscape Analysis

  - [GrowthX analyzed 92k+ keywords from 5 competitors (Procore, Autodesk, Racken, Buildertrend, HCSS) to find organic gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**Procore:** Lacks content depth and LLM optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Autodesk:** Strong on branded and high-value product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [**Racken:** Strong on safety and comparison content ("Racken vs. Fieldwire").](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [**Buildertrend:** Focuses on residential; weak on trade-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [**HCSS:** Focuses on civil construction; has a dry, enterprise tone.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

### Proposed Content Clusters (Initial)

  - [**1. Construction:** Target middle- and bottom-of-funnel (MoFu/BoFu) keywords like "construction plan viewer."](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
      - [**Feedback:** This attracts low-quality leads (e.g., "Blueprint app" users) who don't convert. The angle must be refined to focus on Fieldwire's core strength: working off plans *on the job site*.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [**2. Trade-Specific Content:** Optimize existing pages and create new ones for trades like painting and roofing.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**Feedback:** This is a high-priority opportunity to own the trade contractor niche. New trade pages must be prioritized with the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [**3. Competitor Alternatives:** Create content for high-intent searches like "Procore Alternatives."](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Strong alignment. "Versus" content is a proven success driver.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)
  - [**4. Photo Documentation & Progress Tracking:** Target low-competition keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Split this cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2114.0)
          - [**Photo Documentation:** Viable, as it's a core feature.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2116.0)
          - [**Progress Tracking:** Not a current product strength.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2140.0)
  - [**5. Daily Reports & Field Documentation:** Optimize existing content and create templates.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Important for construction teams; aligned.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [**6. Task Management:** Target a small, high-conversion cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
      - [**Feedback:** High priority. Creating a task is the key user engagement metric and the current Google Ads optimization goal.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)

### New Strategic Priorities

  - [**Integrations:** Create content for a connected ecosystem, including "Product A + Product B" comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2590.0)
  - [**AI / Field Intelligence:** Build thought leadership for the May launch.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2650.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Target both direct AI searches and outcome-based searches (e.g., "how to speed up daily tasks") to capture users seeking benefits.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
  - [**Verticals:** Develop content for high-growth segments like data centers, industrial, and energy.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3346.0)
  - [**"Construction Management Software" Cluster:** Re-evaluate this hyper-competitive topic.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3002.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Create deep, trade-specific BoFu content (e.g., "Construction Management Software for Electricians") to capture high-intent users.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3267.0)

### Content Localization

  - [**Problem:** Content written for the US market uses terminology (e.g., "Punch List") that differs from other English-speaking countries (e.g., "Snag List" in the UK).](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3663.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX can create a "localization checklist" artifact for its AI pipeline to automatically adapt content for specific regions.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3663.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Antonia:**](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3445.0)
      - [Share new competitor names (Bluebeam, Kraaft, Trunk Tools) with William via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3445.0)
      - [Consult the sales team to prioritize new trade-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
      - [Gather input from product marketing on the Field Intelligence AI launch.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=2958.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3627.0)
      - [Update the strategy document with new competitor research and the "Integrations," "AI/Field Intelligence," and "Verticals" clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3627.0)
      - [Analyze the "Construction Management Software" cluster to identify BoFu opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3267.0)
      - [Deliver the updated strategy document by next Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/V2vv4Cf8CvzffMRcAvQsgG_AhsdLgVxX?tab=summary&timestamp=3627.0)
